rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value exemptions and has no relation to Educ. Code §162.002, which enacts the Interstate Compact on Educational Opportunity for Military Children governing school enrollment, placement, and graduation for military children.
quote: Sec. 162.002. EXECUTION OF COMPACT. This state enacts the Interstate Compact on Educational Opportunity for Military Children and enters into the compact with all other states legally joining in the compact in substantially the following form:
_note: No conflict: the rule_text addresses educational compact administration for military children and contains no property tax or homestead exemption provisions.
